creator: ginga@athena.club.ne.jp
text:
ports/audio/afsp/pkg-descr contains unfetchable URL.
it should be modified as follows:

--- /usr/ports/audio/afsp/pkg-descr     Fri Jun  2 11:16:33 2000
+++ pkg-descr   Tue Feb 13 16:55:22 2001
@@ -18,6 +18,6 @@
 The following file formats are supported for writing.
   - Headerless, AU, RIFF WAVE, AIFF-C
 
-WWW: http://www.TSP.ECE.McGill.CA/software
+WWW: http://www.TSP.ECE.McGill.CA/reports/Software/AFsp/AFsp.html
 
 -- Kawaguti Ginga <ginga@athena.club.ne.jp>
